visibleListings.title: Praia Cabral sea-facing penthouse - Vila Cabral 1
visibleListings.description:
Sal Rei – We present this 140 m² penthouse in the prestigious Vila Cabral 1 complex, a luxurious retreat where comfort, exclusivity, and breathtaking ocean views come together. Ideal both as a beachfront residence and as an investment in a rapidly growing tourist market, this property combines contemporary design, top-quality finishes, and functionality designed to offer a unique living experience.
The apartment features a spacious open-plan living area with a perfectly integrated kitchen that opens onto a panoramic terrace transformed into a lounge with sea views—perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The modern, fully equipped kitchen includes an induction cooktop and all necessary appliances for maximum everyday comfort.
The service area adjacent to the kitchen includes a washing machine, dryer, and refrigerator with integrated ice maker, as well as a barbecue available should clients wish to use it, ensuring convenience and flexibility for daily living.
The apartment features two bedrooms: a master suite and one additional bedroom.
The master suite is a true comfort sanctuary, with a walk-in closet, a private terrace with an outdoor shower, and a retractable electric awning, along with ample storage space behind the bed. The suite’s bathroom features Villeroy & Boch fittings, including double sinks, bathtub, shower, toilet, vanity, furniture, and mirrors, creating a harmonious, luxurious, and functional space.
The second bedroom also includes an en-suite bathroom. Both rooms are equipped with independent air conditioning, and the patio doors have electric shutters.
The flooring throughout the property combines real wood parquet and large-format, non-slip Villeroy & Boch tiles, both indoors and outdoors. All bathrooms, including toilets, sinks, vanities, bathtubs, bathroom furniture, mirrors, and fixtures, are also by Villeroy & Boch. The attention to detail and high-quality finishes throughout create a harmonious and elegant living experience.
Outside, the property includes private terraces ideal for al fresco dining or relaxation, two outdoor security cameras, and a direct connection to the ocean, offering a breathtaking view of the Boa Vista landscape.
This penthouse represents a rare opportunity to acquire a property where luxury, comfort, and spectacular views converge, ready to provide an exceptional lifestyle on Boa Vista Island.
For more information or to schedule a private viewing, without obligation, please do not hesitate to contact us. Saturday visits are also available by appointment.

visibleListings.title: Exclusive beachfront villa - Praia de Chaves
visibleListings.description:
Sal Rei – This exclusive beachfront villa, located directly on the stunning Chaves Beach, represents a rare balance of elegance, comfort, and a privileged location, making it ideal both as a private residence and as a high-end tourist investment. Set on a private plot of approximately 1,000 m², the property stands out for its superior finishes, attention to detail, and selection of furnishings imported from Germany, which give the spaces a modern, refined, and cohesive style.
The interiors feature a spacious open-plan living area, with a seamlessly integrated living room and kitchen, fully air-conditioned and enhanced by large windows that provide abundant natural light. The modern, fully equipped kitchen includes a ceramic cooktop, dishwasher, and all necessary accessories for maximum daily comfort. Adjacent to the kitchen is a practical storage room with an integrated washing machine and dedicated storage space.
The sleeping area consists of a single bedroom with an en-suite bathroom, directly integrated within the room, featuring high-end Villeroy & Boch sanitary fittings and large-format, non-slip Villeroy & Boch tiles throughout both indoors and outdoors, creating a harmonious, functional, and luxurious environment with independent air conditioning.
Each space is further enhanced by electric blinds, privacy/mirrored glass, and a built-in Bose audio system for a top-level sound experience. Outside, the villa offers a private garden with a lounge/bar area, a panoramic terrace with sea views—perfect for relaxing or enjoying the Atlantic sunset—and an outdoor shower near the kitchen entrance. For added security and convenience, the property includes an external key safe, four surveillance cameras, two outdoor electrical outlets, private parking, and direct beach access, providing a complete and exclusive living experience.
This villa represents a unique residential solution where modern luxury blends with the tranquility and natural beauty of Chaves Beach, offering an exclusive, move-in-ready retreat on the beautiful island of Boa Vista.
For more information or to arrange a private viewing without obligation, please do not hesitate to contact us. Saturday visits are also available by appointment.

visibleListings.title: Sal Rei - Penthouse with Sea View - Vila Cabral 2 Condominium
visibleListings.description:
Sal Rei – Located in the prestigious Vila Cabral 2 complex, this elegant penthouse offers a unique living experience in Boa Vista, combining comfort, modernity, and stunning panoramic ocean views. With a bright and welcoming atmosphere, it is perfect both as a main residence and as a high-end tourist investment.
The property features a spacious open-plan living area with an integrated kitchen, fully equipped with an electric cooktop and high-quality appliances, ensuring daily functionality and convenience. Adjacent to the kitchen is a first bedroom with a private bathroom, ideal for guests or family members.
The penthouse offers three terraces, including a fully furnished front terrace with sea views, perfect for relaxation, al fresco dining, or entertaining guests. The second terrace, overlooking the salt flats, includes two large storage rooms, while the third terrace, also with sea views, features a small external storage room in front of one of the bedrooms, usable as a dining area or office.
Each room is equipped with independent air conditioning. All patio doors have electric roller shutters, and the windows have shutters, ensuring comfort, privacy, and ease of use. In addition, the penthouse includes an extra space with a small bathroom, ideal for storing linens, towels, and other items, as well as a storage room with a washing machine, dryer, and refrigerator, providing additional convenience.
With four air-conditioned bedrooms, each with a private bathroom, plus an additional WC, the penthouse ensures space and comfort for the entire family or guests. The complex offers a swimming pool and security, providing relaxation, tranquility, and well-being, making this property a rare opportunity to live or invest in one of the most sought-after areas of Sal Rei.
For more information or to schedule a private viewing, without obligation, please do not hesitate to contact us. Saturday visits are also available by appointment.

visibleListings.title: Sal Rei - Charming two-storey villa in the heart of the city
visibleListings.description:
Sal Rei – Just steps from the crystal-clear waters of Estoril and Praia D’Diante, this elegant two-storey villa combines authentic charm, comfort, and a privileged location in the heart of one of Sal Rei’s most sought-after areas. Close to restaurants, shops, and the most beautiful beaches, it stands out for its versatility and unique character — perfect both as a private residence and as a high-end holiday rental.
Designed with natural materials and modern finishes, the property offers a cozy and sophisticated atmosphere, ideal for those seeking a stylish home or an investment with high rental potential. All tiles, both inside and out, are special large-format, non-slip tiles from Villeroy & Boch, and all bathrooms are also by Villeroy & Boch.
On the ground floor, the villa features a private entrance, a second air-conditioned bedroom with an open-space bathroom including a massage shower, and an open-plan living and kitchen area that is bright and air-conditioned, with a fully equipped kitchen including dishwasher and electric cooktop (not induction), wood flooring, and a high-quality sofa. Outside, the property offers a private garden with wooden deck, bar, high-quality barbecue, outdoor shower, and a garden storage room for additional space.
The master suite is located on the first floor, spanning 70 m², including an open-space bathroom, a walk-in closet, and a covered outdoor area. The villa is equipped with independent air conditioning in every room.
Additional features include a private generator for power autonomy in case of outages, four external cameras, electric shutters with privacy or mirrored glass, a 12,000-litre private water tank, perimeter walls with a high-quality alarm system, orthopedic sun loungers, a covered patio, solarium, full internal and external Wi-Fi coverage, and ample space to park an ATV inside the main entrance with an electric gate.
This villa represents a rare opportunity to live or invest in one of Sal Rei’s most prestigious areas, where luxury, security, and comfort merge with the island’s natural beauty.
For more information or to schedule a private viewing, without obligation, please do not hesitate to contact us. Saturday visits are also available by appointment.

visibleListings.title: One-bedroom flat - Golden Dream Homes
visibleListings.description:
Sal Rei – Special price €123.300 until 31/12/2025!
The property is scheduled for delivery in February 2027.
We are selling an elegant one-bedroom flat located in the prestigious Golden Dream Homes residential complex on the island of Boa Vista, in Sal Rei, in the João Questão area, just 200 metres from Estoril beach and a few minutes from the town centre.
The four-storey building has a lift, a 24-hour reception with concierge service, ensuring total security and comfort, and also offers two communal swimming pools with solarium. Each flat has an exclusive parking space. The price does not include furniture or garage. 
The flat has been designed for those looking for a functional, modern and elegant space. The entrance leads directly to the bright living room with open-plan kitchen, designed according to the rigour of Italian design, with simple, practical and harmonious lines. The flat also has a bathroom with walk-in shower, finished with durable natural materials.
The sleeping area features a cosy and quiet double bedroom, designed to ensure comfort and privacy. The great strength of this type of flat is the covered balcony, accessible from both the living room and the bedroom, which creates a perfect continuity between indoors and outdoors. 
In addition to being a high-quality residence, Golden Dream Homes offers a remarkable investment opportunity. Its strategic location and growing tourist appeal make this apartment ideal for short- or long-term rentals, guaranteeing attractive potential returns and stable economic returns.
Please note that, at the buyer’s request, it will be possible to enter into a contract with one of our rental management companies, which will rent and manage the flat during the buyer’s absence, under the following conditions:
6% annual return if the buyer uses the flat for 1 month per year;
5% annual return if the buyer uses the flat for 2 months per year;
4% annual return if the buyer uses the flat for 3 months per year.
*The short-term rental management contract has a duration of 3 years and may be renewed by the parties upon expiry.
**The rental management contract is optional and therefore not binding. It will be possible to use the property privately or manage and rent it independently, in compliance with the condominium regulations.
For further information or to arrange a viewing of the property, without obligation, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are also available for viewings on Saturdays, by appointment.

visibleListings.title: Melia Tortuga 2 Bed Penthouse for Sale

Located in a quiet and peaceful south side position, the apartment faces north and west, offering a choice of sunshine and shade all afternoon, and wonderful sunset views. Everything down to towels and teaspoons is included in the price. The apartment is currently in the hotel rental scheme and so is kept in excellent condition. As the Freehold owner, you are entitled to use the apartment for five weeks of the year. For the rest of the year, it is used as a hotel suite. The hotel takes care of everything from the marketing to guest welcome, cleaning, laundry and even electricity and water bills. You are entitled to receive a of the income, and the management have recently been offering either a fixed income or a profit . Given sufficient notice, you could take the apartment out of the scheme, to use it whenever you like: as a holiday home, winter or year-round residence, or you could rent it out privately to long-term tenants or short term to family and friends. Here, on the west coast of Sal, with the famous white sands and clear turquoise warm waters of Algodoeiro Beach, Melia Tortuga is a low-rise, laid development set amidst lush, mature tropical gardens. There is no waiting to see how it will turn out, no anxiety over staged payments and missed building deadlines: this is a finished build and ready to move into. With rentals now outlawed by the developers in many of the west coast resorts, apartments in Santa Maria offer a safe haven for investors. Rentals are definitely permitted here, indeed this apartment has a proven history of holiday rentals, with average nightly rate of 100 Euros. The new owner will need to apply for their own Alojamento Complimentar (AC) licence, which Casa Verde can assist with. This light, airy apartment, named Sao Vicente after one of the developer’s islands, consists of: Everything down to lamps, towels and teaspoons is included in the price. visibleListings.description: This is a truly spectacular T3 apartment, in the very popular Canna community of Vila Verde. The only 3-bed apartment currently for sale, it has been a family home that the current owners have improved beyond all recognition. Sitting poolside in tropical gardens, private and spacious, this is a wow-factor apartment for the new owners to use as they wish: for holiday or long-term rentals, overwintering in the year-round balmy temperatures, or for permanent living. A fully-accessible and completely renovated apartment, this three bedroom residence has been completed renovated and is designed for indoor-outdoor living. It has an immensely practical and stylish kitchen, new flooring throughout, flyscreen protection on the two enormous terraces and walk-in, wow-factor bathrooms. The emphasis is on luxury but also practicality. There is a vast array of storage, all beautifully designed. Flyscreens on the exterior of the two large balconies mean that the inner doors (also with fly screens and shutters) can be left open all day and night, creating a wonderful through breeze to take the edge off Sal’s average nighttime temperatures of 24°. Though there is aircon, it is unnecessary for all bar the hottest summer nights. The apartment consists of: Turning left from the hallway, you reach the family bathroom and bedrooms. With space-saving sliding doors, both the family and the ensuite bathroom have been completely renovated, to create stunning wetrooms that are accessible and stylish, with large rainfall showers, large mirrors and porcelain fittings including contemporary basins. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to town or beachfront hotel resorts, and has a good mix of residential and tourist accommodation, making it feel more like a small town. Widely acknowledged to have the best construction of any residence on Sal, it is ideal for those seeking peace and quiet, European standards of accommodation, 24-hour security, elevators in all blocks, regular shuttle buses, one of the best supermarkets and a short walk or free shuttle to the beach. With wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde is finished, unique and very appealing for winter living, holidays, or as a permanent home.

visibleListings.title: Melia Dunas Stunning 1 bed Apartment – RARELY AVAILABLE!
visibleListings.description: Melia Dunas is THE prime location on Sal for family holidays. This beautifully presented apartment is right in the heart of this 5*, highly successful hotel, beachfront on the west coast. In Block 4, this top floor apartment is under a minute’s walk from the pool and enjoys stunning views of two coastlines, the beach, golf course and the extinct volcanoes of Cabo Verde’s most developed and accessible island. This top-floor apartment is immaculately presented. The owners, who have been its only users since it was bought off plan have made it a gorgeous haven, with all maintenance kept up to date and many improvements. It is sold freehold, fully furnished and not in the hotel rental scheme. It is therefore entirely up to the owners as how they wish to use it. With a long balcony enjoying unrivalled views from dawn to dusk, this apartment is the ideal place to relax in the sunshine, enjoy peace and quiet when relaxing and sleeping, but being just steps from a fabulous pool, pool bar, the popular water park, tennis courts and reception with its further bars, restaurants and spa. This key-ready apartment includes: Melia Dunas is a 5* family resort and spa, set on the gorgeous white sands of Algodoeiro Beach on the southwest coast of Sal. With seven swimming pools, six restaurants, a pirate ship play area, water park, kids club, multiple bars, it has something for every guest of every age. There are over 300 villas, apartments and studios, a small proportion of which are privately owned. Casa Verde Homes is proud to offer several of these for resale.

visibleListings.title: One Bed Apartment for Sale, Atriplex, Vila Verde
visibleListings.description: An immaculately presented apartment that’s great for watching the world go by, this is a RARE 2nd floor, one bedroom property for sale in the Atriplex community of Vila Verde. Very sought after, Atriplex has a great working pool, newly refurbished, and lies at the very heart of this mixed residential and tourist development on the edge of Santa Maria, Sal. Built to arguably the highest standards on the island, this apartment is truly key ready. Every detail has been thought of and every piece of maintenance taken care of. The current owners, who have it owned this property since Vila Verde was built, have only ever used it as their holiday home. There is, therefore, no damage or guest wear and tear. This apartment is not furnished with a run of the mill, off-the-shelf furniture pack; it has been lovingly and tastefully decorated throughout to create a real “wow” factor and a very comfortable place in which to live or to holiday. The balcony is a fabulous place to relax and enjoy both sunshine and people watching. Facing south, you can watch the sun rising and setting, get a tan all day long, and you overlook the central boulevard of Vila Verde with its bar, coffee shop and restaurant. It is beautifully quiet however, and the private bedroom with large double bed makes for a good night’s sleep, while a large, quality sofa bed provides sleeping for two more. With over sixty square metres, a fully equipped kitchen, clearly defined living area, separate bedroom and separate bathroom, there is ample space here for a family or couple, or for permanent living, and this apartment is a class apart in terms of luxury, open views and its superb order throughout. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to being based in the town or resorts. It is ideal for those seeking western standards of accommodation, 24-hour security, elevators in all blocks, regular shuttle buses, one of the best supermarkets on Sal and easy walking or free shuttle distance to two beaches. With wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde’s architecture is unique and extremely appealing for winter living, holidays and holiday rentals, or as a permanent home.

visibleListings.title: Ocean View Penthouse Studio for Sale, Aloe, Vila Verde
visibleListings.description: If you’re looking for wide open views and plenty of space, this is an excellent choice. This large studio feels much more like a one-bedroom apartment, thanks to its superb design and a massive 68 square metres of space. Most of all, it is the light flooding in from the stunning south-facing balcony that gives this penthouse the real wow factor. With a corner kitchen and separate bathroom, there is a very well-defined dining and living area, with a superking sized double bed, from which you can gaze at the sunrise and the ocean in the distance. This unique studio has clear views of both the east and west coast beaches, as well as the whole of Santa Maria. This is, simply, one of the most panoramic, open views available on Sal. All the furniture is Italian designed and handcrafted here in Cabo Verde, with original artworks on the walls and a large, quality sofa bed. The apartment has been immaculate maintained, everything is in tip-top condition and it has only ever been used by the single set of owners for 1-2 months of the year, as a winter holiday home. The apartment is only available to sell due to the age of the owners. Comfortably sleeping two or four, this has been a wonderful, much loved great holiday home for the current owner, but it could be easily used for short or long term lets, with Freehold ownership and private rentals allowed, subject to the appropriate licence. It would also make a lovely full-time home. This penthouse studio apartment includes: Everything is included down to the curtains, teaspoons and cushions. It requires no work. With low condo fees, it is a key ready, lock up and leave penthouse. Aloe is a popular community in the centre of Vila Verde with working lifts, an entry phone system and tropical gardens. It does NOT have a working pool currently, hence the low condo fees, but this apartment does not overlook the pool area and has sea views. The owners can enjoy the fabulous Clubhouse pool for just 10 Euros per person, per month. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to the bustling town or beach-front hotel resorts. It is ideal for those seeking European standards of construction and accommodation, 24-hour security, elevators, regular free buses, a great supermarket and a short distance walk /free shuttle from Santa Maria, the beach (with free sunbeds) and Espargos. With wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde is a fully completed mixed residential and tourist resort that is highly aspirational for buyers of all nationalities.

visibleListings.title: Superb Vila Verde Penthouse Studio for Sale
visibleListings.description: This picture-perfect studio in the Lantana community of Vila Verde is, to our knowledge, the only penthouse studio currently available for sale in Vila Verde on the open market, and it’s a beautiful one. Casa Verde Homes is pleased to present such an excellent, fully furnished top floor studio, in a condominium with working lifts and with such open, extensive views. When you picture an idyllic holiday apartment, this is what you may well see. The moment you open the door, the light floods in and you are drawn to the unoverlooked balcony. Here, the west-facing views are of palm trees, sunshine and sunsets, the Melia hotels in the distance and tropical gardens. By the end of 2026, the view will include the newly refurbished swimming pool complex. Lovingly maintained, decorated and with many extras, this studio has all you need, whether travelling solo or as a couple. With the addition of a sofabed, it could easily sleep a family. This is a great holiday home for the current owner. What you choose to do with it is up to you, with Freehold ownership and private rentals allowed, subject to the appropriate licence. Surprisingly large, this 62m²+ apartment includes: This property has recently been revalued, making it very attractive to buy, with both IUP (council tax) AND its sales tax halved. With low running costs, it is a turnkey, lock up and leave investment that is perfect for your second home, in the sunshine. PLEASE NOTE: The residents voted and paid extra condo fees in 2025 to reline and reopen the pool complex in the centre of the condominium, meaning that Lantana is scheduled to have a gorgeous communal pool during 2026. Keen eyed investors will take advantage of the lower sales price now, knowing that market values and popularity of Lantana will almost certainly grow with the restoration of the pool. Lantana is a well-maintained and friendly community, with working lifts, an entry phone system and tropical gardens. With 24-hour security, you can rest well, and the apartment with excellent double glazing is quiet, despite its position at the front of Vila Verde. With a couple of minutes’ walk, you are at the Cactus pool bar and restaurant, a bike hire shop, the café/gelateria and the free shuttle bus stop. It’s also approximately 15 minutes’ walk from the fabulous Bikini Beach, 20 minutes to Kite Beach which is very popular with all kinds of surfers in the winter, and is a protected turtle nesting beach during the summer and autumn. It’s also 5 minutes by free, regular shuttle bus from Santa Maria and Ponta Preta beach. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to the bustling town or beach-front hotel resorts. It is ideal for those seeking European standards of construction and accommodation, 24-hour security, elevators, regular free buses, a great supermarket and a short distance walk /free shuttle from Santa Maria, the beach (with free sunbeds) and Espargos. With wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde is a fully completed mixed residential and tourist resort that is highly aspirational for buyers of all nationalities.

visibleListings.title: Vila Verde Townhouse with Pool Views, Yucca
visibleListings.description: Two-bedroom townhouses in Vila Verde are increasingly scarce, and this is a beautifully presented example for sale in the Yucca community. Representing some of the best value real estate in Sal, Cape Verde, this semi-detached townhouse has a roof terrace, pool and garden view, south facing balconies, patio and garden, and simply must be seen. Those seeking a home, or home away from home in Cabo Verde, rather than just a holiday apartment for a fortnight, should certainly consider a townhouse. The Vila Verde townhouses are very well constructed, spacious, with split levels and plenty of outside space; ideal for families or couples seeking that bit more space. They also have very low condo fees when compared to apartments that can be much smaller. This Yucca townhouse has annual fees of just under 1,000 Euros, whereas in resorts just across a cobbled street, you would pay 2.5 times that on a one-bedroom apartment. Impeccably furnished and decorated, this townhouse has two bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, two balconies, a rear patio, a fully fitted kitchen, a light and airy dining room, a garden, large lounge and a huge roof terrace. In total, this Yucca townhouse offers 151.75 square metres of accommodation over five levels. This lovely house, sold Freehold and fully furnished, is close to all the amenities including tennis courts, clubhouse pool and gym, with the 20+ daily shuttle buses stopping almost opposite. It is less than ten minutes’ walk to Bikini Beach, with its safe year-round swimming and snorkeling, miles of coral sands and all the usual beach amenities. Vila Verde has four restaurants, one at Ponta Preta beach, two bars, a coffee shop, a highly-rated supermarket, gym, tennis courts, ATM, various stores and a very regular free shuttle bus that takes residents and guests to Ponta Preta Beach (5 mins), Santa Maria town (5 mins) and Espargos, the capital (20 mins). It is the only tourist resort to have elevators and to allow pets. With 24-hour security, Vila Verde is considered one of the most aspirational and safest places to live on Sal.

visibleListings.title: Ocean View 2 Bed Penthouse, Beachside
visibleListings.description: This beautiful Italian-designed penthouse faces the ocean on the slightly wilder and beautiful coast of Sal at Praia Antonio Sousa. Though peaceful and within earshot of the waves, this gorgeous property with wide ocean views is less than 10 minutes’ walk to the heart of Santa Maria, Sal. This is the first residential road from the sea, is known as Millionaire’s Row, and represents some of the best real estate on Cabo Verde’s main tourist island. Well decorated and maintained, this roomy penthouse is a very successful Airbnb, and is rented out for 120 Euros a night to groups of four. With two large bedrooms and an ample lounge, plus space for a mezzanine if required, it can comfortably accommodate six people, so is great for families, for group vacations but also roomy enough for year-round living. A new owner could continue to rent it out, with the appropriate licence, and no restrictions. With low condo fees and IUP, this is an excellent alternative to the more costly resorts, where private rentals are often restricted and being legally disputed. Beachside is a well-constructed, secure and exclusive building, with just 10 privately-owned apartments, used mainly as holiday rentals and second homes. Beachside is a peaceful retreat from the hustle and bustle of larger apartment buildings and the town of Santa Maria. All the restaurants, bars, shops and nightlife are a short beach-side walk away, and yet you can retreat for a good and secure night’s sleep. This is also enhanced by the fact there are no neighbours above. Casa Verde Homes is delighted to have both penthouses on this top floor for sale, which could allow for an extraordinarily large, deluxe apartment of 4-5 bedrooms. A keen investor may also choose to buy one to live, and one to rent out. There is construction taking place between Millionaire’s Row and the sea at present, scheduled for completion in 2026. There will be a mixture of restaurants, a surf school and apartments, no higher than 2 storeys. This will, on completion, likely enhance the value of this Beachside penthouse, giving more local dining options. The view of the ocean will remain. As a comparison, the new build apartments that face the ocean along this row are priced at 550,000 Euros.

visibleListings.title: SUPERB POOLSIDE RENOVATION IN MELIA TORTUGA
visibleListings.description: Casa Verde is delighted to present a completely refurbished apartment facing one of the beautiful pool complexes at Melia Tortuga. This is one of the best renovations we have seen, bringing a fully accessible, family friendly ground floor 2 bed right up to date with a very high spec and attractive interior. Everything down to the curtains, air fryer and bedding is included and of a European standard. You can truly move in, and enjoy. The position of this fully furnished, poolside apartment cannot be rivalled. Parents or grandparents can be sitting on their large private patio while the children play safely in the kids’ pool right in front. It is mere steps from this lovely, flower-festooned terrace to the adult swimming pool, the on to reception, the bars, restaurants, spa and – of course – the beach. With a walk-in shower, new kitchen, boiler and more, this property is truly ready to move into and enjoy, with no works required. With hotel standard fixtures and fittings and everything included, this 2-bedroom resort retreat has one of the best locations in Melia Tortuga, and rivals anywhere else on Sal. It is immediately next to the pool, so right in the heart of the resort, putting you straight into holiday mode. It has a large, retiled terrace that faces west to make the most of the sunny afternoons and sunsets. It is fully accessible, so for young families and those with accessibility needs. From your terrace, you can keep an eye on the children while relaxing in the sunshine. Step free, this spacious, well-planned accommodation is ready to move into and compromises, from the door: This dream apartment is not only right by the quieter and children’s pool, but the kids’ club, a pool with bar, Italian restaurant, La Cabana beachside restaurant and – of course – the pristine sands of Bikini Beach. All are within a few minutes’ level walk. This apartment is not in the hotel rental scheme, meaning that it can be used as a winter or holiday home, permanent residence, long-term lets or for friends and family. It would be possible to put it into the rental scheme, whereby the Melia Tortuga hotel team takes care of everything from the marketing and guest services, to the cleaning, laundry, maintenance and utility bills. The owners can use the apartment for five weeks of the year, every year, while for the remaining 47 weeks it becomes a hotel suite. The owners receive a of the income. Here, on the west coast of Sal, with the famous white sands and clear turquoise warm waters of Algodoeiro Beach, Melia Tortuga is a low-rise, laid development set amidst lush, mature tropical gardens. There are miles of white sand beaches in front of the resort, with safe swimming and snorkeling almost all year round in the warm waters of Bikini Beach.
visibleListings.location: Superb Poolside Renovation In Melia Tortuga

visibleListings.title: Beachside Penthouse: Ocean Views, Praia Antonio Sousa
visibleListings.description: This is a stunning and private penthouse facing the ocean, on what is commonly referred to as Sal’s Millionaire’s Row: the first residential street at Praia Antonio Sousa. With the sound of the waves, 180 degree ocean views and under 10 minutes’ walk into the centre of Santa Maria, it is small wonder that this is amongst the most sought-after real estate on Cabo Verde’s main tourist island. Superbly decorated and extremely well maintained, this is a spacious apartment which can easily sleep six, so suitable for families, for group vacations and for year-round living. It has been run as a very successful Airbnb, and private rentals are very much allowed, with the appropriate licence. With Italian architecture and design, Beachside is of high-quality construction and the building is secure and well run. The 10 apartments within are all privately owned, and most are used as holiday flats or second homes. It is a quiet and exclusive small development, with large white hallways and stairwells, always kept clean, and Beachside is thus a real haven away from the hustle and bustle of larger apartment buildings and the town of Santa Maria. All the restaurants, bars, shops and nightlife are a short beach-side walk away, and yet you can retreat for a good and secure night’s sleep. This is also enhanced by the fact there are no neighbours above. Casa Verde Homes is delighted to have both penthouses on this top floor for sale, which could allow for an extraordinarily large, deluxe apartment of 4-5 bedrooms. A keen investor may also choose to buy one to live, and one to rent out. This fully-furnished penthouse has been lovingly furnished in a French style, and includes over 130 square metres of living space: There is construction taking place between Millionaire’s Row and the sea at present, scheduled for completion in 2026. There will be a mixture of restaurants, a surf school and apartments, no higher than 2 storeys. This will, on completion, likely enhance the value of this Beachside penthouse, giving more local dining options. The view of the ocean will remain. As a comparison, the new build apartments that face the ocean along this row are priced at 550,000 Euros.

visibleListings.title: Prime Development Site Central Santa Maria
visibleListings.description: Opportunity to build 3-4 storey apartment/commercial block We are pleased to present a rare development opportunity in the very heart of Santa Maria. Those who are familiar with the main tourist town of Sal will know that real estate for sale in the centre is extremely scarce, and prices are astronomical. For under 400,000 Euros, here is a plot ripe for development. A traditional stone house of 170.78m² currently sits on a plot located between the pharmacy and hotel and brand new four storey apartments and aparthotels, on Santa Maria’s second most popular tourist street, and one of the main commercial roads housing banks, bakeries, the only pharmacy, restaurants and hotels. This is the ONLY traditional house for sale on the pharmacy street, and offers a developer an extraordinary chance to modernise, or to demolish and build. Planning permission allows for a 3 storey building to be placed here, with access from not only the pharmacy street but from the street behind. With the appropriate permissions (and precedent in neighbouring buildings), this might be extended to 4 floors. The ground floor could be developed into street front commercial units with frontage facing two streets, with accommodation – 1 or 2 bed apartments or a mix of both – above. Considering the size of the house, an investor building to three storeys would have access to over 500m² of property. Currently a single storey residence in need of complete renovation, the property has five bedrooms and three bathrooms, as well as a large open plan living, dining and kitchen area, tiled throughout, plus a rear terrace and flat roof. It will be sold fully furnished, and many of the appliances and much of the furniture holds value. Electricity and water are already supplied and functioning, and Casa Verde can confirm that there is clean title held by one family, all adults with the right and agreement to sell, with no debt. There is precedence for mixed commercial and residential building along this street, with neighbouring properties including a hotel and high-end apartment blocks, some of which have rooftop pools, elevators, etc. This is a prime area for both commercial rentals and sales of street front units, and for residential sales and lettings. The current sales prices as of October 2025 are approximately 150,000 Euros for a T1 (one bed) apartment with balcony, and up to 250,000 Euros for a T2 (2 bed) penthouse. The return on investment is therefore clear to envisage. Early viewing of the site and the possible building is highly advised.

visibleListings.title: PENTHOUSE WITH POOL VIEWS: Melia Tortuga
visibleListings.description: ** PRICED FOR A QUICK SALE ** NOT IN HOTEL RENTAL SCHEMEIf you’re looking for a key-ready apartment with superb pool views on Sal, then look no further. This hotel-standard penthouse, with 2 bedrooms and a 15 square metre balcony, is fully furnished, and ready to move into. It includes WiFi and aircon. Located in a peaceful position with side views of the quieter of the two pool complexes, the apartment faces west, to make the most of the afternoon sun and the sunsets. The eagle eyed will even spot a slight sea view, between the palms! Sold freehold and fully furnished, this 2-bedroom and 1-bathroom penthouse has an enviable location within easy walking distance of the two pool areas, and of course the beautiful Algodoeiro beach: also known as Bikini Beach – beyond. Set in the tropical gardens of the 5* resort of Melia Tortuga – one of the most sought-after locations on Sal – this apartment has the restaurants, bars, spa and gym within a few minutes’ level walk. Those who want to enjoy the beach or pools, all the attractions, but then get a good night’s sleep will truly appreciate this. The well-planned accommodation includes, from the entrance: Though there are five restaurants in the resort and many more on the beach and in the other Melia hotels, this penthouse is well set up for self caterers. The fully-equipped kitchen includes a 4-ring hob, conventional and microwave oven, washing machine, fridge with small freezer and ample cupboard space. Everything down to towels and teaspoons is included in the price. The apartment has recently exited the hotel rental scheme and so is kept in excellent condition. As the Freehold owner, you are entitled to use the apartment whenever you like, for as long as you like: as a holiday home, winter or year-round residence, or you could rent it out privately to long-term tenants or short term to family and friends. Here, on the west coast of Sal, with the famous white sands and clear turquoise warm waters of Algodoeiro Beach, Melia Tortuga is a low-rise, laid development set amidst lush, mature tropical gardens. There are miles of white sand beaches right on your doorstep, as well as safe swimming and snorkeling almost all year round in the warm waters of Bikini Beach.

visibleListings.title: Praia Antonio Sousa, Santa Maria: Stand Alone 2/3 Bed Duplex for Sale
visibleListings.description: This versatile, large apartment is just steps from the beach, within earshot of the sea. Ideal for renting out both short and long term, it has NO condominium fees and its own private entrance. With up to three bedrooms, two bathrooms and ample living space, this makes a perfect Airbnb or long-term living home by the beach. In a quiet, residential area, Ca Coral enjoys an enviable position within steps of the sand, yet less than 10 minutes’ level walk into the centre of Santa Maria, with all its restaurants, shops and bars, the iconic pier and safe swimming beaches. Arranged over two floors, the fully-furnished duplex has been redecorated and updated, to include: The kitchen, boilers, aircon and showers have all be replaced within the last couple of years. As a long-term rental, this duplex has a track record of earning 600 Euros a month, while as a holiday let it is priced at 120 Euros a night for four people. It therefore offers the opportunity of excellent return on investment, but it is also a lovely, bright and airy apartment in which to live.

visibleListings.title: Refurbished Two-Bedroom Apartment: Santa Maria
visibleListings.description: Less than 300 metres from the beach If you’re looking for a roomy apartment that’s ready to move into or rent out, with no restrictions on holiday lettings, quiet but still within 300m of the coast and just a kilometre from the centre of Santa Maria … congratulations, you just found it. Here is a stunningly renovated two-bedroom second floor apartment in Praia Antonio Sousa. Set within a well-managed, Italian designed and constructed building, it is key ready with EVERYTHING new, and included in the sale, from the boiler to kitchen, to teaspoons, cushions and towels. This is a secure, unrestricted place in the sun. With superb lighting and interior design, this charming apartment has been significantly upgraded with classy décor and furniture, and the space maximised to create a leaving a wonderful, light and airy space. It’s what everyone is looking for: a family-sized apartment within easy reach of all the amenities and beaches, in a good, secure building with low condo fees than can be rented out as you wish, subject to the local licensing laws. On the first floor, the accommodation, tiled throughout comprises: The apartment is secure and secluded, yet in a fast-developing area. It is adjacent to the new town piazza and commercial centre, and the planned new development of Serena Bay, projected to include a marina and duty-free shopping mall, near the southern tip of Sal. It is therefore in a prime spot for increasing in value, and would make a lovely home or holiday let.

visibleListings.title: OCEAN & POOL VIEWS: Paradise Beach 2 Bed for Sale
visibleListings.description: Those who have dreamed of waking up to gaze out at the ocean, stepping out onto your private balcony to watch the waves and boats, wondering whether to take a morning dip in the pool below … it’s time to wake up, and see the reality for sale here on Sal! This is a true “get away from it all” holiday home or permanent residence – an amazingly spacious 2-bedroom first floor apartment – in Paradise Beach. Facing directly towards the ocean and overlooking the pool, this fully-furnished, gorgeous apartment has stunning views, unrivalled for apartments in any other resort. Its terrace has the true wow factor: accessed from both from the living room and ensuite master bedroom. With outside furniture and sunbeds included in the sale, this is where most will be spending their time – enjoying the tropical gardens, the view of the pool just steps away, as well as the stunning Algodoeiro Beach – less than 5 minutes level walk away. With quality furniture and excellent, solid construction, this apartment is a perfect retreat. The balcony is completely private and, on shutting the large patio doors, there is utter quiet, but with flyscreens in place, you could leave the doors to the balcony open, and enjoy the breeze and distance sounds of the ocean. The resort of Paradise Beach is peaceful and secure; loved by professionals, fishermen, walkers and surfers, to name but a few. It is not packed with kids’ clubs, bars, noisy pools, clubs and restaurants, but all are available at neighbouring Melia Dunas and Bikini Beach. The accommodation comprises: The expression “key ready” is used all too often, but this dream apartment truly is. Everything is in working order, there is air conditioning in both bedrooms and the lounge, and down to extra sets of bedding and cutlery, everything is included. Private holiday lets are allowed at Paradise Beach, so this could also provide a rental income when you’re not using it, subject to obtaining the appropriate local council licence, which is available free of charge until November 2025. With lower condo fees than in other resorts, holiday lets through platforms such as Airbnb and Booking.com are an attractive proposition here. The management at Paradise Beach also provide a long-term rental programme for those seeking a regular, guaranteed income. Set on the glorious, untamed west coast of Sal, just 5 minutes from Santa Maria and 15 minutes from the airport, Paradise Beach is a developing resort with huge potential. Directly opposite the 18-hole golf course to the east and Melia Dunas to the south, it covers 283,000 square metres of prime coastal real estate – the equivalent of 19 football pitches. With immaculate gardens and excellent swimming pools, it is a tranquil retreat from the hustle and bustle of Santa Maria, with some of the most spacious accommodation and best sea views of any resort on Sal. Plans are well underway for completion of the resort with a hotel and further amenities, but for now Paradise Beach offers excellent value for money and a glorious retreat from the stresses of everyday life.

visibleListings.title: LAND PLOTS FOR SALE: ENTRANCE TO SANTA MARIA
visibleListings.description: Plot 1: 215.83m² 79,995 Euros Plot 2: 223.81m² 79,995 Euros (open to negotiation for a single sale of both plots) Exclusive to Casa Verde Homes: for sale we have two land plots with permission for mixed commercial and residential use. Plans have already been drawn up and approved for up to 5 apartments and 3 commercial spaces, spread over 3 floors and a rooftop extension. Just 750 metres from Santa Maria’s pier and beach and 15 minutes from the international airport, these plots are ripe for development. In a rapidly developing area of Santa Maria, this is a rare opportunity to own and develop on land so close to the centre of the main tourist and commercial centre of Sal. Just behind the main road between Espargos, the airport and Santa Maria, both plots are close to the Shell garage, school, new hospital, football stadium and opposite the boutique hotel: Hotel Sobrado. Importantly, the new main spur road from the roundabout to the southern tip of the island ay passes very close to both plots, making this area a prime target for investors. There are very few such plots available on the open market. Neighbouring plots have been snapped up by those keen to construct Aparthotels, guest houses, hotels and various commercial enterprises such as beauty parlours, logistics companies, high end carpenters and joiners, aluminium distributors, design and firms, car washes … indeed almost every commercial enterprise imaginable is needed here. Cabo Verde is a fast-developing economy, with over 7.3% growth and 1.4 million tourists in 2024, the vast majority of whom come to Sal. for further information and to arrange a viewing.

visibleListings.title: MELIA TORTUGA POOL VIEWS APARTMENT
visibleListings.description: This key ready, fully accessible apartment enjoys pool views from its private, unadjoined terrace, and is situated in the very heart of the 5* beachfront resort of Melia Tortuga – one of the most sought-after locations on Sal. In superb condition, this 2-bedroom and 2-bathroom apartment has an excellent location within easy walking distance of the two pool areas, and of course the beautiful beach beyond. The restaurants, bars, spa and gym are all within a few minutes’ level walk, but the apartment enjoys a beautifully peaceful position, set in tropical gardens. Those who want to enjoy the beach or pools, all the attractions but then get a good night’s sleep will truly appreciate this. The well-planned accommodation includes, from the entrance: Shower room on entry Large open plan living & dining area Well-equipped kitchen 15.22m² unadjoined terrace 1 double bedroom with aircon & TV Family bathroom with bath and shower over Twin bedroom Though there are five restaurants in the resort and many more along the beach, this property is well set up for self caterers. The fully-equipped kitchen includes a 4-ring hob, conventional and microwave oven, washing machine, fridge and ample cupboard space. Everything down to towels and teaspoons is included. Sold freehold and fully furnished, the apartment is currently in the hotel rental scheme. This means that the owners enjoy 5 weeks’ accommodation a year free of charge, and have the property managed by the hotel for the rest of the year. The owners own the bricks and mortar, but have none of the cost or work involved in marketing the property, attracting, welcoming and looking after guests, nor the maintenance, repairs, cleaning, laundry, electricity and water. All is taken care of. For those seeking a lifestyle investment and a modest income, the rental scheme can work well. Buyers are strongly encouraged to explore the rental scheme agreement and possible returns on investment. Given the appropriate notice, this beautiful apartment can be taken out of the hotel rental scheme, ready to be used as your holiday home, winter or year-round residence – an idyllic retreat for family and friends. Here, on the west coast of Sal, with the famous white sands and clear turquoise warm waters of Algodoeiro Beach, Melia Tortuga is a low-rise, laid development set amidst lush, mature tropical gardens. There are miles of white sand beaches right on your doorstep, as well as safe swimming and snorkeling almost all year round in the warm waters of Bikini Beach.

visibleListings.title: T1 VILA VERDE PENTHOUSE FOR SALE: Fabulous Refurbished Lantana Apartment
visibleListings.description: One bedroom penthouses in Vila Verde, also known as T1s, are increasingly scarce on the open market, and it’s very rare that we find one in as excellent condition as this. With two balconies and a corner plot, this is a larger than average T1 on the top floor of the Lantana condominium, with wide west-facing views. Early viewing is recommended, as this will sell quickly. This property has recently been revalued, making it very attractive to buy, with both IUP (council tax) AND its sales tax halved. With low running costs, it is a turnkey, lock up and leave investment that is perfect for your second home, in the sunshine. The accommodation comprises: PLEASE NOTE: The residents voted and paid extra condo fees in 2025 to reline and reopen the pool complex in the centre of the condominium, meaning that Lantana is scheduled to have a gorgeous communal pool during 2026. Keen eyed investors will take advantage of the lower sales price now, knowing that market values and popularity of Lantana will almost certainly grow with the restoration of the pool. Lantana is a well-maintained and friendly community, with working lifts, an entry phone system and tropical gardens. With 24-hour security, you can rest well, and the apartment with excellent double glazing is quiet, despite its position at the front of Vila Verde. With a couple of minutes’ walk, you are at the Cactus pool bar and restaurant, a bike hire shop, the café/gelateria and the free shuttle bus stop. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to town or beach-front hotel resorts. Widely acknowledged to have the best construction of any residence on Sal, it is ideal for those seeking peace and quiet, European standards of accommodation, 24-hour security, elevators in all blocks, regular shuttle buses, one of the best supermarkets and a short walk or free shuttle to the beach. With wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde is finished, unique and very appealing for winter living, holidays, or as a permanent home.

visibleListings.title: Superb 3 Bedroom Townhouse: Vila Verde
visibleListings.description: Casa Verde is delighted to present this spacious 3 bed, 4 bath luxury townhouse in the highly sought after Washingtonia Avenue, Vila Verde. Those seeking space, comfort and quiet for all the family will find their haven here. Whether for permanent or winter living or simply a huge holiday/second home in the sun, this is an affordable opportunity that comes along very rarely. These townhouses are often snapped up on the day they come onto the market at the full asking price. This is currently the only 3-bedroom townhouse for sale in Washingtonia. Why are Vila Verde townhouses so popular? Simply put, nowhere else on the island of Sal can you own such a large, quality build home for this price. This townhouse offers superb value for money with low ongoing running costs. Widely acknowledged as the best construction on Sal, these townhouses are under 15 years old and have enduring design and curb appeal. The split-level accommodation includes three double ensuite bedrooms (each 16m²+), a fully-fitted kitchen, a 25m² lounge and a rooftop terrace or solarium covering over 21 square metres. Sold Freehold and with vacant possession, this townhouse has been immaculately maintained and improved by a single family who have lived there for many years. By September 2025, the house will be vacated with the additional furniture and clutter that arises from family living removed and all walls etcetera made good. It is therefore imminently ready for the new owners to put their stamp on. In Vila Verde, owners of townhouses are entitled to rent out their properties privately through platforms such as Airbnb and Booking.com, have pets, live year round, park their car directly outside, and change the internal layout. It is very much YOUR home, free of the constrictive regulations of other resorts that operate mostly as hotels. All the amenities are on hand, and the community is fully constructed and finished, with 24/7 security patrols. This sets Vila Verde apart against its competitors in Cabo Verde, and makes it a peaceful, safe and thriving place to live and holiday. Several owners of these townhouses choose to operate them as Guesthouses*, and a neighbouring property has, in 2025, generated rental income of over 1,700 Euros a month. Considering the condo fees on this townhouse are under 1,350 Euros per year, the economics of this option are clear to see. Of course, you can simply choose to enjoy it for your private use whenever you like. The split-level accommodation, arranged over six levels, comprises: Having sleeping areas on different levels separated by a short run of stairs ensures maximum privacy and quiet for all residents. The townhouse is sold FULLY FURNISHED, with everything down to the last teaspoon included. People from all nationalities choose to holiday and live year-round at Vila Verde. It is a carefully planned village built between 2006 and 2012, just a 4-minute drive out of Santa Maria on the beautiful west coast. With wide, tree lined boulevards, gorgeous gardens and large pools organised into different condominium communities, Vila Verde has all the amenities needed for holiday making or year-round living including * Free shuttle buses running 20 times a day to and from beach & town * excellent supermarket * ATM * 4 restaurants * 3 bars * free sunbeds at Ponta Preta * bike hire *coffee shop & gelataria * 24-hour security * subject to obtaining the correct local licence

visibleListings.title: Rare 3 bed penthouse with panoramic ocean views -Melia Dunas
visibleListings.description: If you’re looking for a stunning, spacious 3-bed property without paying villa prices, if you dream of ocean views and space for all the family, this could be the apartment for you. In the heart of the 5* Melia Dunas hotel resort and spa on Sal’s gorgeous west coast, this is a spectacular penthouse, fully furnished, providing one of the best views on the island. Fully furnished to a very high standard, this penthouse includes: The rooftop terrace, or solarium, is a jaw-dropping, private area for sunbathing or socialising, whilst enjoying views of three coasts of the island. The panorama must be seen to be believed, and increases the size of your living space by some 70 square metres. With all day sunshine, you can enjoy this space from sunrise until stargazing. It is something very special indeed. In terms of position, Block 5 is hard to beat. In easy walking distance of all the attractions of Melia Dunas and just a 3 minute walk from reception, it has a huge communal swimming pool complex (1 adult, 1 children’s) with bar. This pool is noted as one of the quieter pools with sunbeds more readily available than the other six pools available to you. With the bar and palm front sunshades, it makes for an idyllic place to relax and enjoy Sal’s year-round sunshine. It is just a short stroll to the gorgeous white sands and year-round safe swimming and snorkelling at Bikini Beach, by way of Boulevard with shops and bars, and further pools and restaurants on the way. This could be your fantasy holiday home, a haven for family and friends, for long-term rental or simply as your key-ready winter home. The penthouse is absolutely ready to move into, with everything you see included in the sale, down to the patio furniture, the last towel and teaspoon. It has been lovingly maintained and cared for, furnished to a very high standard, and has only ever been used by the family. Melia Dunas has something for everyone and is a very popular holiday destination, including:
visibleListings.location: Rare 3 Bed Penthouse With Panoramic Ocean Views Melia Dunas

visibleListings.title: 2 Bed, 2 Bath Penthouse In Melia Tortuga
visibleListings.description: This key ready, garden view penthouse is in the 5* resort of Melia Tortuga, one of the most sought-after locations on Sal. It has come out of the rental scheme recently, so remains in immaculate and guest-ready condition. Sold freehold and fully furnished, this 2-bedroom and 2-bathroom apartment has a peaceful, secluded location on the right-hand side of the resort. It is less than 2 minutes’ walk however from one of the large pools – for those who know the resort, this is the ‘top’ or quiet pool. The penthouse has a private, unadjoined balcony overlooking the gardens. Though close to the reception, pools and restaurants, this property is not overlooked and is in a quieter corner of the tropical and desert gardens. Those who want to enjoy the beach and the resort all day but get a good night’s sleep will appreciate this. The well-planned accommodation includes, from the entrance: Shower room on entry Large open plan living & dining area Well-equipped kitchen 15.22m² balcony 1 double bedroom with aircon & TV Family bathroom with bath and shower over Twin bedroom Though there are five restaurants in the resort and many more on the beach and in the other Melia hotels, this penthouse is well set up for self caterers. The fully-equipped kitchen includes a 4-ring hob, conventional and microwave oven, washing machine, fridge with small freezer and ample cupboard space. Everything down to towels and teaspoons is included in the price. The apartment is delivered out of the hotel rental scheme in excellent condition, and is ready to be used as your holiday home, winter or year-round residence, or it can be rented out privately to long-term tenants or short term through the hotel’s rental scheme, should the owners choose to put their Freehold apartment into this scheme. Here, on the west coast of Sal, with the famous white sands and clear turquoise warm waters of Algodoeiro Beach, Melia Tortuga is a low-rise, laid development set amidst lush, mature tropical gardens. There are miles of white sand beaches right on your doorstep, as well as safe swimming and snorkeling almost all year round in the warm waters of Bikini Beach.

visibleListings.title: PARADISE BEACH: 3 BED OCEAN VIEW TOWNHOUSE
visibleListings.description: Casa Verde Homes is proud to bring to market a stunning, ready-to-move-into townhouse, offering pure luxury and ocean views. This quality home offers 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms and some 176sqm of indoor-outdoor idyllic living, with a breathtaking west-facing roof terrace. When we say “fully furnished” this property is that – and more. It has been a private holiday home for one family only, and as well as top of the line furniture, fixtures and fittings it includes countless extras: bicycles, artwork …even golf clubs and trolley! It is beautifully decorated and furnished, and has been very well cared for and improved, including air conditioning, fly screens and fans. Cool, light and airy, it will make someone an amazing home or holiday rental. Solidly constructed and arranged to make the absolute most of the fabulous views and the outdoors, the accommodation comprises: Position is everything. This is a second-line property, meaning only the frontline villas (priced in excess of ¾ million Euros) lie between this townhouse and the spectacular beach. The villa in front of the property remains under construction, and their plans include a large pool and single storey garage, meaning the views from the roof terrace of this townhouse will only be enhanced. Melia Dunas and Bikini Beach are almost adjacent to this property, with all their restaurants and bars. The shrewd investor will note that those neighbouring Dunas villas are priced far in excess of this, a near neighbour. It is a short, level walk to both the beach and communal pools. Set on the glorious, untamed west coast of Sal, just 5 minutes from Santa Maria and 15 minutes from the airport, Paradise Beach is a developing resort with huge potential. Directly opposite the 18-hole golf course to the east and Melia Dunas to the south, it covers 283,000 square metres of prime coastal real estate – the equivalent of 19 football pitches. With immaculate gardens and excellent swimming pools, it is a tranquil retreat from the hustle and bustle of Santa Maria and the hotel resorts, with some of the most spacious accommodation and best sea views of any resort on Sal. Plans are well underway for completion of the resort with a hotel and further amenities, but for now Paradise Beach offers excellent value for money and a glorious retreat from the stresses of everyday life.
visibleListings.location: Paradise Beach 3 Bed Ocean View Townhouse

visibleListings.title: Prime Land – Development Opportunity, Santa Maria
visibleListings.description: This large, level plot is situated near the southern tip of Sal, very close to the Serena Bay development, which promises to add a third more hotel beds to the island by 2030, shopping mall and marina for up to 150 yachts. This neighbouring land is therefore ripe for development and has permission to build a ground floor plus two storeys for residential use. It sits just around the corner of the planned new major road artery through Santa Maria, where in future – it is planned – tour company buses and taxis will pass with every tourist, sailor or shopper bound for the new resort and parking outside, as Serena Bay is intended to be car free. There are very few such plots available on the open market, and this is sold with clean, single title. Neighbouring plots have been snapped up by those keen to construct Aparthotels and guest houses. Importantly, this land marks the boundary of the town development plans, due to its proximity to the turtle nesting grounds and unique dune biosphere. Beyond this point, the town is NOT planned to be developed further, meaning there should be no obstacle to the views of the ocean facing south and west. The scope for a truly spectacular residence or block of apartments is boundless. A rooftop pool, a largely glass façade … both could make for glorious views of the ocean, from sunrise to sunset. The infrastructure is fast developing in this neighbourhood, with street lighting, cycle paths, rubbish bins, commercial centre and parking spaces in place, and a new town centre crescent just steps away already under construction. With panoramic views of both the east and west coast beaches, this plot is under 250 metres from Praia Antonio Sousa and Shell Cemetery beach, and approximately the same from the natural pool and three bays which can never be developed, around Praia de Ingrejinha. With Kite Beach just 100 metres further, this site would be a haven for all surfers and kitesurfers, plus nature lovers, as Kite Beach is a protected turtle nesting beach. Please for further details and a viewing, whether virtual or in person.

visibleListings.title: 2 Bed Beachside Apartment: Praia Antonio Sousa
visibleListings.description: Those wanting to be as close to the beach as possible will certainly appreciate the position of this first-floor apartment: right in front of Praia Antonio Sousa, towards the southern tip of Santa Maria and Sal itself. Mere steps onto the sand and a gorgeous coastline, this private and fully furnished apartment is an ideal base for holidays, or a superb opportunity to generate income through holiday or long-term rentals. From the entrance, you have an open plan living and dining area, fully fitted kitchen, large fridge, leading to a balcony that faces west, with a partial sea view to the left and right. This Italian-designed Ca Oceano apartment is tiled throughout, has air conditioning, shutters, excellent double glazing and the condominium has good and regular maintenance. A hallway leads to two large bedrooms and a family bathroom between, fully tiled and in excellent condition. There are two generous twin bedrooms, that can easily be converted to doubles. The current owners have maintained and cared for this apartment since they bought it off plan, and it has been used as a fantastic winter residence. This is a developing area, with the edge of the new Serena Bay development visible to the south, and a new building under construction to the left of Ca Oceano. This is reflected in the price. Praia Antonio Sousa is a beautiful part of Sal’s coastline. With pure white sands and crystal clear azure waters, it is a haven for those who enjoy windsurfing, snorkeling, fishing, scuba diving or simply sunbathing under swaying palms. ‘Millionaire’s Row’ is the street that faces the west, dotted with individual and beautifully constructed houses, that are mostly divided into apartments. The area directly in front of the apartments includes Buddha Beach Hotel, which is open to owners for cocktails, meals and more. A new restaurant is under construction, there is an outdoor gym, Columbus and Angulo restaurants, Giramondo ice cream … and a plethora of other shops and surf schools. It remains a quiet, laid area that is relished for its exclusivity, peace but proximity to the beach, surf, and Santa Maria.

visibleListings.title: Beachfront 3 bed: Praia Antonio Sousa
visibleListings.description: The word “unique” is bandied around too much, but this 3-bedroom ground-floor apartment truly is. Larger than some villas, it enjoys an amazing beachside location and 180°ocean views. The internal accommodation is very well planned, with vast amounts of storage, but what truly sets this completely accessible home apart is the outside space. Here, you could have a fourth bedroom, a fifth bedroom, a garage, a shop, a workshop … there is almost as much outside space as there is internally, the versatile space wraps around three sides of the apartment. From this superb and secure space, you can step out onto the sand, watch the ocean, the boats and surfers, and as you’re facing west, enjoy Santa Maria’s sunsets. The apartment is in an idyllic spot, yet is under 2 minutes’ walk to a safe swimming beach and 10 minutes’ level walk to the heart of the town, with all the restaurants, bars and shops. Praia Antonio Sousa itself is a highly sought-after developing location, towards the southern tip of Sal, and with Serena Bay being built less than 500 metres away. There are new restaurants, surf schools and convenience stores popping up all the time. While the surroundings change, this apartment on what is known as Millionaire’s Row will always enjoy its location so close to the beautiful azure sea and the beach. The tastefully decorated and well-maintained accommodation comprises: The scope of this apartment must be seen.

visibleListings.title: Paradise Beach: Ground Floor 2 Bed Apartment
visibleListings.description: Those seeking an “away from it all” holiday home or permanent residence may well fall in love with this amazingly spacious 2-bedroom ground floor apartment in Paradise Beach. Facing the west, this fully-furnished and accessible apartment covers over 110 square metres. Its main attraction is the terrace, 30 square metres alone – the size of some studio apartments! With ample outside furniture and a barbecue included in the sale, this is where most will be spending their time, enjoying the beautiful tropical gardens, the view of the pool which is just steps away, and the warm year-round sunshine. There is even a glimpse of the sea, with Algodoeiro Beach less than 3 minutes level walk away. With luxurious, quality furniture and excellent, solid construction, this apartment is a perfect retreat. The terrace is completely private, and on shutting the large patio doors which access the terrace from the lounge and both bedrooms, there is utter quite. The resort of Paradise Beach is peaceful and secure, and loved by professionals, fishermen, walkers and surfers, to name but a few. It is not packed with kids’ clubs, bars, noisy pools, clubs and restaurants, but all are available at neighbouring Melia Dunas and Bikini Beach. The accommodation comprises: Set on the glorious, untamed west coast of Sal, just 5 minutes from Santa Maria and 15 minutes from the airport, Paradise Beach is a developing resort with huge potential. Directly opposite the 18-hole golf course to the east and Melia Dunas to the south, it covers 283,000 square metres of prime coastal real estate – the equivalent of 19 football pitches. With immaculate gardens and excellent swimming pools, it is a tranquil retreat from the hustle and bustle of Santa Maria, with some of the most spacious accommodation and best sea views of any resort on Sal. Plans are well underway for completion of the resort with a hotel and further amenities, but for now Paradise Beach offers excellent value for money and a glorious retreat from the stresses of everyday life.

visibleListings.title: Prime Commercial Opportunity: La Piazza
visibleListings.description: Looking for an office or commercial space? Those with an eye on the future shape of Santa Maria will recognise the great opportunity available in this ground-floor office of La Piazza building. At the very heart of the planned new town centre, the Piazza crescent will be a focal point for tourists and locals alike. This is the first unit on the left of the crescent, butting right up to the new main road. With cycle paths, street lighting – even rubbish bins – and benches in place, this road leads directly to the Serena Bay resort with its planned marina, shopping mall and 1800 new hotel rooms, with Corendon Airlines managing the hotel. Every bus and taxi will pass this space. The building is in the process of being painted, and lies directly opposite is Commercial Centre, which currently houses Novita – probably the premier imported furniture shop on the island – a wood/flooring shop and a mini market. Commercial Centre will only develop more as we get closer to the planned opening of Serena Bay in 2030. Businesses like Art Kafe have already seen the potential of this area, and developer Ocean Property is building villas and an apartment block adjacent to this area. With a large, blank canvas space inside, high ceilings, a well-paved area outside, this would be suitable for multiple purposes. It could be a coffee shop, sandwich bar, retail outlet, bookshop, estate agency … and has previously been used as a property management office. It has a good size bathroom and the shelving and desks can be included in the price. It is very secure with metal shutters to both the double entrance doors and windows, which when opened flood the space with light. Utilities are already supplied. This commercial space has very low running costs with condo fees under 350 Euros a year and IUP (council tax) of under 65 Euros. This is a chance for a shrewd investor to avoid the ever-rising commercial rents in Santa Maria, and snag one of the best spots in the planned new town centre.

visibleListings.title: Large Studio Apartment with sea view, Vila Verde
visibleListings.description: If you think that studios are small and cramped, think again. This 43sqm studio in the Raphis community of Vila Verde offers very good space and storage, comfortably sleeping four adults. With a lovely view over the sea with beautiful sunsets, it is bright, light and airy. On entry to the apartment, there is a fully fitted kitchen to the right, including a washing machine. On the left side you find the bathroom that includes a full-sized bath with shower over and bidet. The hallway includes an entry phone, then the space opens up into a dining area and the large sofa bed. With ample storage and a full- size double bed, the open plan living area is completed by a gorgeous 9 square meters balcony, surrounded by flowers. Very well maintained and decorated, this apartment would also make an excellent long or short-term rental. Similar studios in the much sought-after Vila Verde, regularly let for between 400 and 600 Euros per month. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to being based in the bustling town or large hotel resorts. It is ideal for those seeking European standards of accommodation, 24-hour security, elevators in all blocks, regular shuttle and one of the best supermarkets on Sal. It is in easy walking or free shuttle distance to two beaches. Bikini Beach is under ten minutes’ walk with wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde’s architecture is unique and extremely appealing for winter living, holidays and holiday rentals, or as a permanent home.

visibleListings.title: Fabulous Rooftop Terrace Melia Dunas Penthouse
visibleListings.description: This is a breathtaking apartment with some of the best views on Sal, including two coastlines, a golf course, the town of Santa Maria and no less than three swimming pools. This is from your private rooftop terrace, where you can gaze at the scenery whilst sunbathing all day long. Watch the sun rising over the east coast beach; watch it setting in the west. With almost 121 square metres, this penthouse is ready to move into, fully furnished and equipped. It is a dream holiday home, with: * large kitchen (including all appliances) * open plan living and dining area, with long hall * sunny south-facing balcony, with pretty spiral staircase leading to: *stunning roof terrace/solarium with 360° views * one twin bedroom with fitted wardrobes * double bedroom and ensuite bathroom, fitted wardrobes, TV This penthouse is in a league of its own. It sits within Block 6 of the 5* Melia Dunas Hotel and Spa, near to the kids’ club and tennis courts, with an easy level walk to all the amenities that the resort has to offer and – of course – the gorgeous Bikini Beach with its white sands, miles of walking along the coastline and crystal-clear waters. Currently in the hotel rental scheme, the apartment is sold Freehold, so new owners have the choice of how to use it. You can leave it in the scheme as a hassle-free lifestyle investment, meaning it is used for 47 weeks of the year by the hotel as a regular room, leaving the owners 5 weeks to enjoy it themselves. The hotel looks after everything from the marketing to guest welcome, laundry, cleaning, utility bills and maintenance. Owners receive a of the rental income. Alternatively, it can be taken out of the scheme for private use by yourselves, family and friends or for long-term rentals. Melia Dunas has something for everyone and is a very popular holiday destination, including:* beachfront resort * 7 pools * Spa * Gym * Kids’ Club * Waterslides * Pirate Ship and other playgrounds * Tennis courts * Entertainment * Exercise Classes * Safe, calm beach for swimming and snorkelling * gorgeous sandy beach * adjacent 18 hole golf course * golf cart/buggy transport around the resort Management fees deducted at source while in the Rental Scheme

visibleListings.title: Cactus 2 Bed Penthouse, Vila Verde
visibleListings.description: It’s extremely rare for a 2-bedroom top floor apartment in Cactus to come onto the open market. This Freehold penthouse has a superb position and outlook, no less than three balconies offering both wide open ocean and pool views, and comes with a fully-fitted kitchen, two fully fitted bathrooms, fitted wardrobes in both wardrobes all shutters and lighting. Cactus is the best maintained, most sought-after condominium community in Vila Verde. It is where the hotel guests are housed, has a superb pool and its own bar and restaurant within lush green gardens. The views are also stunning, overlooking Kite Beach, the hills of Serra Negra beyond, and right round to the town of Santa Maria. Cactus commands a premium price both for buying and renting, and the penthouses even more so. Very generously proportioned, the 95sqm includes two bedrooms, two bathrooms (one ensuite), three balconies (one off each bedroom), an open plan living area, well equipped kitchen and excellent storage. Vila Verde is widely acknowledged to have the best construction quality of the residential developments on Sal. Please note: the property comes unfurnished. The buyer will need to add their own sofas, tables, beds and possibly air conditioning. The current tenant will be moving out on completion of the sale. Whether you choose to make this your home or rent it out to holidaymakers or long-term tenants, this will be a superb investment. You can watch the sunrise over the ocean from your bedroom, and the sun setting over the pool from the main balcony off your open plan living area. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to being based in the town or resorts. It is ideal for those seeking European standards of accommodation, 24-hour security, elevators in all blocks, regular shuttle buses, one of the best supermarkets on Sal and easy walking or free shuttle distance to two beaches. With wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde’s architecture is unique and extremely appealing for winter living, holidays and holiday rentals, or as a permanent home.
