visibleListings.title: 2 Bed, 2 Bath Ground Floor Apartment In Melia Tortuga
visibleListings.description: Situated on the ground floor and accessible to all, this fully furnished 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom resort retreat has a quiet location towards the northern side of the resort. It has a private, unadjoined terrace that faces west to make the most of the sunny afternoons. Though close to both pools, it is not overlooked and sits in a quiet area of the well-tended desert and tropical gardens. The spacious accommodation is fully guest ready and compromises, from the door: Ground floor apartments in Tortuga are particularly suitable for those with accessibility needs as well as families with babies and children in pushchairs, as the apartment and access to the beach, restaurants, pools and reception are step free. This apartment is not in the hotel rental scheme, meaning that the owners can use it year round, whenever they wish, for long-term rentals or for family and friends to use whenever they like. If you wish, you could opt to put it into the rental scheme, meaning that the Melia Tortuga hotel team takes care of everything from the marketing and guest services, to the cleaning, laundry, maintenance and utility bills. In the scheme, the owners can use the apartment for five weeks of the year, every year, while for the remaining 47 weeks it becomes a hotel suite. The owners receive a of the income. Here, on the west coast of Sal, with the famous white sands and clear turquoise warm waters of Algodoeiro Beach, Melia Tortuga is a low-rise, laid development set amidst lush, mature tropical gardens. There are miles of white sand beaches in front of the resort, with safe swimming and snorkeling almost all year round in the warm waters of Bikini Beach.

visibleListings.title: Santa Maria 3 Bed Townhouse
visibleListings.description: Houses like these, within easy walking distance of the beaches and the town centre, do NOT come along every day. With 120 square metres of well-constructed living space, Italian design and build, 3 bedrooms and a large outside garden and roof terrace, this immaculate townhouse must be seen. The current owners bought this amazing property off plan around 17 years ago, when it was just a stick in the ground. Their faith paid off, as they have enjoyed this as a family home ever since. Lovingly maintained, it is an Italian architect-designed home for a price less than many 2-bed apartments. It is sold fully furnished, has very low annual costs, as the IUP is just 138.75 Euros a year and there are NO condo fees. The property comprises: • Wrap-around largely paved terrace • very secure ground floor • open-plan living and kitchen area • wooden non-slip stairs • 2 bedrooms and family bathroom on first floor • 1 bedroom with patio doors to roof terrace • utility room (could easily be converted into a 2nd bathroom) • sunny tiled roof terrace with ocean views This is an investment for the future. It takes some vision to see what this fast-developing area is going to be in just a few years’ time. Though at the moment, many people see this as a quiet backwater with sandy streets and building works going on, a quick glance at the town plan shows that this will be in the heart of the new tourist and commercial centre of southern Santa Maria. Renowned developers Ocean Property have confidence in this area; so much so that they have built an entire avenue of modernistic villas just around the corner, and are constructing a new residential and commercial block on this very street. The road on which this house sits will soon be surfaced, and lies just behind the main new road to Serena Bay (large hotel and marina) and the central piazza. Just a few minutes’ walk from the sea, this semi-detached townhouse has views of two coastlines from the roof terrace. Within a couple of hundred metres are the almost deserted coves and natural swimming pool on the southern tip of the island, a nature reserve and turtle nesting ground, shell cemetery beach and Kite Beach. Ill health forces sale.

visibleListings.title: 2 Bed Penthouse In Melia Tortuga With Ocean Views
visibleListings.description: Casa Verde is proud to present one of the most well-appointed two-bedroom penthouses in Melia Tortuga. Here, on the west coast of Sal, with the famous white sands and clear turquoise warm waters of Algodoeiro Beach, you have ocean and sunset views in a relaxed, peaceful resort. This is a privately-owned apartment that is NOT in the hotel rental scheme, and has been run as a successful Airbnb. It is therefore up to the new owner how they would like to use it: as a holiday or winter home, as a holiday let, as a permanent residence or to enter it into the hotel rental scheme run at Melia Tortuga. The accommodation comprises: Guest ready, this apartment is sold fully furnished with sunbeds, airconditioning, ample self catering equipment and even all the bedding. Melia Tortuga is a low-rise development set amidst lush, mature tropical gardens. It is a laid- resort and spa, a great place to unwind without forced activities and bells and whistles of the large hotels. Set on glorious white sands, there are miles of clean beaches to enjoy, as well as safe swimming almost all year round. With water sports galore, there is some of the best snorkelling in the islands, just steps into the warm sea. Many of the apartments and villas in Melia Tortuga are privately owned, and Casa Verde are pleased to have several for sale.

visibleListings.title: Melia Dunas Stunning 1 bed Apartment – RARELY AVAILABLE!
visibleListings.description: Block 1 of Melia Dunas is THE prime location for holidays. This beautifully presented apartment is right in the heart of this 5*, highly successful hotel, beachfront on the west coast. 30 seconds walk from the main pool, 30 more to reception, the boulevard with bars and shops is less than a minute’s level walk away. This penthouse enjoys sea views and is just a short stroll from the beach. This top-floor apartment is immaculately presented. The owners have made it a gorgeous haven, an exemplary holiday rental, and it has been highly successful as such. New owners could choose to continue with using it for holiday lets, or make it into a private holiday or retirement apartment. It is sold freehold, fully furnished, and not in the hotel rental scheme. It is therefore entirely up to the owners as how they wish to use it. With a very long, south-facing balcony, this apartment is the ideal place to watch the world go by whilst enjoying the sunshine, enjoy peace and quiet when relaxing and sleeping, but Melia Dunas is a 5* family resort and spa, set on the gorgeous white sands of Algodoeiro Beach on the southwest coast of Sal. With seven swimming pools, six restaurants, a pirate ship play area, water park, kids club, multiple bars, it has something for every guest of every age. There are over 300 villas, apartments and studios, a small proportion of which are privately owned. Casa Verde Homes is proud to offer several of these for resale.

visibleListings.title: Dunas 1 Bed Key-Ready Apartment for Sale
visibleListings.description: Casa Verde is delighted to bring to market a key-ready, one bed apartment with a long, sunny balcony enjoying pool views. Though this first-floor apartment is currently in the Sol Dunas hotel rental scheme, it is due to exit in February 2026, It is in hotel-standard condition, with no works or repairs needed and represents fantastic value for money at under 50,000 Euros. Though only a minute’s walk from the main pool and restaurant, this first floor apartment provides a very quiet and private space for sleeping and relaxing. It has a south-facing balcony, a sofa bed, large bathroom including bath with shower over, and an open plan living and dining area. Whilst there is currently no kitchen, one wall already has all the space and plumbing for a large kitchenette. Immaculately presented, this block 9 apartment is priced for a quick sale and will attract the keen-eyed investor, so early viewing is highly recommended. Sol Dunas is the newly-rebranded 3*, relaxed and family-orientated section of Melia Dunas, with a fabulous pool, bars, restaurants, entertainment, water slides and a pirate ship, plus of course access to the gorgeous white sands and safe swimming at Bikini Beach, directly in front of the resort. With access to sports bars, basketball courts, beach volleyball and so much more, there is something for every age group. With a separate bedroom and a sofa bed, there is comfortably enough room to sleep a group of four. As this apartment is sold Freehold and fully furnished and out of the scheme in February 2026, the new owner will have the choice of using the apartment privately for as much of the year as they like: for themselves, family and friends, as their holiday home in the sun, or for long-term rentals. The owner could choose to put it into the hotel rental scheme, meaning that, for 47 weeks of the year, the management of the hotel takes care of everything from selling the room and welcoming guests, to laundry and electric bills. The owners have five free weeks of holiday accommodation each year, and take a of the profits generated. There is currently a generous offer of a fixed quarterly minimum payment being made available to many owners; please ask us for details.

visibleListings.title: Large studio overlooking pool, Vila Verde
visibleListings.description: If you think that studios are small and cramped, think again. This 43sqm studio in the Pepper community of Vila Verde offers very good space and storage, comfortably sleeping four adults. With a lovely view over the sunlit pool, which is for the exclusive use of owners in this condominium, it is bright, light and enjoys a great breeze. On entry to the apartment, there is a fully-fitted kitchen to the right, including a washing machine, and two floor-to-ceiling double storage cupboards to the left, leading to a large bathroom that includes a full-sized bath with shower over and bidet. The hallway includes an entryphone, then the space opens up to a dining area, TV unit and the large sofa bed. With ample storage including a triple wardrobe, a full-size double bed and patio window with shutters and juliette balcony completes the accommodation. Very well maintained and decorated, this apartment has only ever been used by one family as their holiday retreat. It would also make an excellent long or short-term rental. Similar studios in the much sought-after Vila Verde, regularly let for between 400 and 600 Euros per month. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to being based in the bustling town or large hotel resorts. It is ideal for those seeking European standards of accommodation, 24-hour security, elevators in all blocks, regular shuttle buses (one stops right outside this condominium) and one of the best supermarkets on Sal. It is in easy walking or free shuttle distance to two beaches. Bikini Beach is under ten minutes’ walk With wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde’s architecture is unique and extremely appealing for winter living, holidays and holiday rentals, or as a permanent home.

visibleListings.title: Fabulous 2 bed penthouse in Melia Tortuga
visibleListings.description: Superb opportunity in Melia Tortuga. This is a gorgeous 2 bed, 2 bath top floor apartment with a 15sqm balcony overlooking the main pool, palm trees and gardens of Melia Tortuga. Perfect for holidaymakers, this apartment comes fully furnished, guest ready, and is NOT in any kind of hotel rental scheme. Sold Freehold, it’s all yours. On the south side of Melia Tortuga, with glorious sunset views from the west facing balcony might just as easily be your tranquil winter holiday home. All the facilities you need are here with 2 pool complexes, 5 bars, 4 restaurants, spa, shop and gym onsite. Melia Tortuga is a beachfront resort with miles of golden sands right on the doorstep; safe swimming almost year round, great snorkelling and water sports. Must be seen.
visibleListings.location: Fabulous 2 Bed Penthouse In Melia Tortuga

visibleListings.title: Superb 4 bedroom villa with private pool
visibleListings.description: In our opinion, this is one of the best detached villas on Sal. Situated at the end of a cul de sac in Vila Verde, it is a private, luxury haven with stunning views across two coastlines and Santa Maria. Built to the highest standards, this enormous villa – 218 square metres – has been lovingly maintained and upgraded to offer unrivalled family or group accommodation, whether for holidays, a winter home, letting out or permanent living. * 10 minute walk from the beach * Private, detached and unoverlooked villa * private pool * over 200sqm indoor space on a 747sqm plot * ideal indoor-outdoor living * low condo fees A perfectly proportioned villa, the accommodation includes four double bedrooms (2 ensuite), 2 further bathrooms, a large deck, summer house, outdoor pool (in need of a new liner), fully equipped kitchen, dining area, summer kitchen / conservatory, vast lounge (over 37m2), a large wrap-around garden with mature planting, parking space and garage, 24 hour security, two balconies and a roof terrace of over 68 square metres, offering one of the most stunning views on the island. It sits on a plot of over 745sqm and is private and peaceful. Only a viewing allows full appreciation of the quality and spacious living on offer. From the Italian leather sofas to the outdoor deck with shower, every detail has been thought of and the villa is ready to move into, once the pool is refilled. It has only ever been used by one family as a retreat from the northern European winter, so is in excellent decorative order. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to being based in the town or resorts. It is ideal for those seeking European standards of accommodation, 24-hour security, tennis courts, one of the best supermarkets on Sal and easy walking or free shuttle to two beaches. With wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde’s architecture is unique and extremely appealing for winter living, holidays and holiday rentals, or as a permanent home.

visibleListings.title: 2 Bed End of Terrace Townhouse, Vila Verde
visibleListings.description: This is a very well-maintained and presented 2-bedroom townhouse in the Yucca community, close to all the amenities including tennis courts, clubhouse pool and gym, with the 20+ daily shuttle buses stopping almost opposite. It is less than ten minutes’ walk to Bikini Beach, with its safe year-round swimming and snorkeling, miles of coral sands and all the usual beach amenities. Those seeking a home, or home away from home in Cabo Verde, rather than just a holiday apartment for a fortnight, should certainly consider a townhouse. The Vila Verde townhouses are very well constructed, spacious, with split levels and plenty of outside space; ideal for families or couples seeking that bit more space. They also have very low condo fees when compared to apartments that can be much smaller. This Yucca townhouse has annual fees of just under 1,000 Euros, whereas in resorts just across a cobbled street, you would pay 2.5 times that on a one-bedroom apartment. Impeccably furnished and decorated, this townhouse has two bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, two balconies, a rear patio, a fully fitted kitchen, a light and airy dining room, a garden, large lounge and a huge roof terrace. In total, this Yucca townhouse offers 151.75 square metres of accommodation. Vila Verde has four restaurants, one at Ponta Preta beach, two bars, a coffee shop, a highly-rated supermarket, gym, tennis courts, ATM, various stores and a very regular free shuttle bus that takes residents and guests to Ponta Preta Beach (5 mins), Santa Maria town (5 mins) and Espargos, the capital (20 mins). It is the only tourist resort to have elevators and to allow pets. With 24-hour security, Vila Verde is considered one of the safest places to live on Sal.

visibleListings.title: DuarGema, House of Diaspora – S02 DUPLEX T2
visibleListings.description: Exceptional Modern Duplex Apartment T2 with Private Covered Parking This unique and modern duplex apartment T2 boasts a total area of 123.86 m² and is southwest-facing. Both bedrooms have direct access to private balconies with stunning ocean views, each featuring its own en-suite bathroom. Duplex apartments S01 to S04 provide a high level of privacy, thanks to their exclusive driveway and secluded position, which separates them from the main apartment building. This residence offers not only a comfortable retreat but also the potential for passive rental income. The DuarGema House of Diaspora residential complex is located in a peaceful area of Praia, the capital city, which provides full urban amenities, an international airport, and a seaport. The main ground floor of the complex features a restaurant, shops, and a fitness center. The living area is arranged as a two-storey space with direct access from the living room and kitchen to the rear terrace, where you’ll find a private swimming pool and a summer kitchen under a pergola – perfect for everyday living and time with friends. The DuarGema villa district, together with the DuarGema House of Diaspora apartment complex, forms a gated condominium offering a restaurant, shops, and a fitness centre directly on site. The quiet location in the capital city of Praia provides complete infrastructure, including an international airport and port. We provide comprehensive administrative support, from property registration at the land registry to assistance with obtaining a Cape Verdean “green card”. On the private rear terrace behind the house, you’ll find a swimming pool with a summer kitchen under a pergola – ideal for relaxing, grilling, or enjoying quiet summer evenings. The villa’s basement has a comfortable garage for two vehicles. The master bedroom is a suite with its own bathroom; other rooms are suitable for family, guests, or a home office. The DuarGema villa district, together with the DuarGema House of Diaspora apartment complex, forms a gated condominium offering a restaurant, shops, and a fitness centre right on site. The peaceful location in Praia provides full infrastructure, including an international airport and port. We provide comprehensive administrative support, from property registration at the land registry to assistance with obtaining a Cape Verdean “green card.” For an overview of the full range of DuarGema Alpha, Beta, Gama and Delta villas, go to the Develpore Projects section HERE. * By submitting the form, you agree to the processing of your personal data for the purpose of sending you an offer. visibleListings.title: Building plot on the island of  São Vicente 505 m2
visibleListings.description: Building plot of 505 m2 on the island of São Vicente, in Mindelo, a quiet southern part of Ribeira de Julião, 7 minutes from the centre and 10 minutes from the popular beach Praia da Laginha. The use of the land is approved for the construction of properties for holiday or permanent residence. Electricity, water, gas and drainage at the boundary of the property. There is a primary school, a university, a nursery school, restaurants, tennis courts and a bus stop with a regular service nearby. The island has a world-famous port, an airport and good connections to the nearby island of Santo Antão, which is a popular and sought-after tourist destination for its incredible natural beauty. The approved use of the land is ideal for the construction of a luxury villa or apartment block with future rental income. Buying land in Cape Verde is also a suitable medium term investment with minimal risk and guaranteed protection against inflationary devaluation of your finances. The average increase in the market value of land in São Vicente is around 15%, but the supply of land in the capital is limited and the price is rising faster.São Vicente is the second most populous island in Cape Verde and has a well-developed tourism industry. Foreign investment interest is also an important factor contributing to price increases. Investors from Europe, America and Africa are targeting Cape Verde. Infrastructure development is another factor contributing to the growth in property values. In recent years, the island has invested in the construction of new hotels, restaurants and other facilities. info@estatecv.com, tel.: +420 736 446 317, +420 605 922 695 Another must-see island in the Cape Verdean archipelago. Firstly, because it is the only way to get to the true green paradise of Santo Antão, but mainly because the island itself has so much to offer. Even if all you read about this island is the town of Mindelo (where 93% of the island’s population live), this island has so much more to offer! For me, this was one of the biggest surprises, where the diversity of the island, with the most beautiful Cape Verdean capital, the most beautiful Cape Verdean beach and the most amazing swimming pool I have seen so far, pushed this originally not so attractive island to the top of my subjective rating. Written by Kateřina Ostrá, popular Czech traveller * By submitting the form, you agree to the processing of your personal data for the purpose of sending you an offer. visibleListings.title: First  line, white sand, investment property – Maio
visibleListings.description: Large plot on the island of Maio with a total area of 31000 m² directly on the beach at the village of Morro, which is only 2 kilometers from Porto Inglês, the capital of the island. The village has a population of up to 1000 inhabitants and its main advantages include tranquility, comfort, privacy and beautiful nature. In addition, Praia do Morro beach, a nature reserve and nesting site for endangered sea turtles, is located in the immediate vicinity of the village. You can visit Praia Baxona, a beach near the town of Calheta, which is made up of a combination of white and black sand. The beach is 500 metres long and has a semi-circular shape. The ocean water is calm and virtually wave-free all year round. This makes it an ideal place for swimming even with small children. In the past, the beach served as a connection point with the nearby island of Santiago, but nowadays it is used by local fishermen from Calheta. The beach is also frequented by locals who come here for swimming, sunbathing and sports. The island of Maio can be reached by boat or plane from Santiago. If you fly from the capital Praia, you can reach the island in 8 minutes. By boat it takes 60 minutes. All basic services are available on the island, including health care. * By submitting the form, you agree to the processing of your personal data for the purpose of sending you an offer. visibleListings.title: Land for sale in the Chã de Norte area on the island of São Nicolau
visibleListings.description: The land totals 3,000 m2 and it is possible to subdivide it. The infrastructure is built on site and all basic services are available, including health care. São Nicolau (Saint Nicholas) is located between the islands of Santa Luzia and Sal. As St. Nicholas continues to remain largely unexplored and untouched, it provides tourists with the experience of discovering abandoned villages and beautiful nature. However, St. Nicholas also offers beautiful beaches with white and black sand to tourists. Fogo Island, nicknamed the Island of Fire, is located in the south of the country and is one of the largest and most populated Cape Verde islands. The island is dominated by Cape Verde’s highest mountain, Pico de Fogo, a still active volcano. The view of the volcano is truly impressive and climbing it is one of the greatest experiences you can have in Cape Verde. There are also endemic plants on the island, mainly the “cow’s tongue” (echium vulcanorum) and the “wild carnation” (erysimum caboverdeanum), which have been declared endangered by UNESCO. Thanks to the high-quality and fertile volcanic soil, the island can be proud of a wide range of high-quality agricultural products. Among many, especially an iconic wine and one of the best coffees in the world. hiddenListings.title: RESIDENCE SANTA MARIA
hiddenListings.description: Description Located less than 200 meters from one of the most beautiful beaches in the island of Sal, Cape Verde. Located less than 200 meters from the stunning Santa Maria beach, on the island of Sal, Cape Verde, the Residence Santa Maria represents a unique investment opportunity in one of the most sought-after locations in the archipelago. This exclusive residence stands out for its high construction quality, exceptional finishes, and the use of premium materials, ensuring maximum comfort and a modern, elegant design. Residence Features: 21 apartments available in different types (T1 - T3) 3 commercial spaces on the ground floor Panoramic rooftop pool with sun deck Elevators for easy access to upper floors Private terraces and storage rooms for each unit Large windows for natural light and spectacular views Apartment Types: T1: One-bedroom apartment with open-plan living area, equipped kitchen, master bedroom, modern bathroom, and terrace. T2: Two-bedroom apartment with spacious living room, compact kitchen, two bedrooms, bathroom, balcony, and storage. T3: Three-bedroom apartment with a large living area, full kitchen, three bedrooms, two bathrooms, and a private terrace. hiddenListings.title: DuarGema, House of Diaspora – S01 DUPLEX T2
hiddenListings.description: Exceptional Modern Duplex Apartment T2 with Private Covered Parking This unique and modern duplex apartment T2 boasts a total area of 123.86 m² and is southwest-facing. Both bedrooms have direct access to private balconies with stunning ocean views, each featuring its own en-suite bathroom. Duplex apartments S01 to S04 provide a high level of privacy, thanks to their exclusive driveway and secluded position, which separates them from the main apartment building. This residence offers not only a comfortable retreat but also the potential for passive rental income. The DuarGema House of Diaspora residential complex is located in a peaceful area of Praia, the capital city, which provides full urban amenities, an international airport, and a seaport. The main ground floor of the complex features a restaurant, shops, and a fitness center. Additionally, you have the option to purchase a storage unit (ranging from 7.8 m² to 12 m²) and/or an extra parking space (16.2 m²) in the underground levels. Availability of storage units and parking spaces is limited. We handle the entire administrative process, including property registration with the Land Registry. For a complete overview of available apartments, visit the Developments section HERE. Price: negotiated price | 63 m2 | T1 What is the price of the property?

LA PUNTASSA, Apartment A, Boa Vista Island, Sal Rei, Estoril Beach
hiddenListings.description: A modern T2 apartment with a total usable area of 105.52 m² is located on the ground floor of the La Puntassa building, directly on the golden-white sandy beach of Estoril in Sal Rei. Its location offers not only a view of the Atlantic Ocean, but also quick access to the promenade, pier, restaurants and shops. The layout includes two bedrooms (one of them en-suite), two bathrooms, a living room with a kitchenette, a functional flow of living zones and a 5.6 m² balcony with a direct view of the ocean. Within a 5-minute walk, you can reach the town hall, a bank and the office of a mobile operator. By car, it’s just a few minutes to the petrol station and 10 minutes to the international airport with direct flights to major European cities. The ocean in this part of the coast is ideal for swimming and recreational fishing. The beach is protected by the small island of Ilhéu de Sal Rei, which creates a calm setting for everyday seaside living. hiddenListings.title: LA PUNTASSA, exclusive penthouse G, Boa Vista Island, Sal Rei, Estoril Beach
hiddenListings.description: Penthouse G, a spacious 2-bedroom apartment, is located on the top floor of the La Puntassa residential building, right on the golden sands of Estoril Beach in Sal Rei. With a total usable area of approximately 296 m², it combines premium interior space with three private terraces – each offering a unique perspective, atmosphere and use. The interior features a comfortable living room with a kitchenette, two bedrooms (one of them en-suite), and two bathrooms in total. Large French windows open from the main living area directly onto the front-facing terrace overlooking the ocean. This space includes both covered and open areas for relaxing, dining, or enjoying the view. An elegant staircase leads to the rooftop terrace with a private pool – an elevated space with uninterrupted views of the ocean and the town. It’s the ideal setting for sunbathing, relaxing or spending private evenings under the open sky. From the rooftop, you can access the third, rear-facing terrace, which offers a serene and private atmosphere – perfect for barbecues with friends, yoga, or a quiet morning coffee. This space is fully shielded from the outside world, yet open to the sun and the stars. Price: negotiated price | 124 m2 | T2 Price: negotiated price | 63 m2 | T1 What is the price of the property?

hiddenListings.title: For sale building plot of 3852 m² in Ribeira Brava on the island of São Nicolau – Juncalinho
hiddenListings.description: Well located plots in Ribeira Brava on the island of São Nicolau – Juncalinho We offer for sale well located plots in the area of Ribeira Brava, near the town of Juncalinho, on the island of São Nicolau. The land is located in the first row directly in front of the beautiful lagoon “Lagoa” near the town of Juncalinho located in the eastern part of the island of São Nicolau, Cape Verde. It is located on the northern coast. Ribeira Brava is a town with the seat of the Ribeira Brava Municipality. The town is located in the valley of the wild Ribeira Brava in the east of the main mountain range of the island. There is a good infrastructure in place and basic services are also available. for sale 12 plots of 321 square meters, each with sea views, in São Nicolau. Plots of 321 square meters, total of 3852 square meters with 80% occupancy, for investment, first line with 3 sea and mountain views in one of the most beautiful locations of São Nicolau – Lagoa de Juncalinho. With all infrastructure close to the plot. The prestigious Forbes magazine has highlighted the island of São Nicolau in its list of “5 incredible islands to visit in 2022”. According to Forbes magazine, “this underappreciated jewel of the Atlantic offers many opportunities for ecotourism and outdoor adventure. From the coastal town of Tarrafal de São Nicolau, you can head north for spectacular mountain vistas and endemic plants in the Monte Gordo Natural Park or west to Carbeirinho, an impressive coastal massif of eroded cliffs.” This is an international recognition that is linked to the Cabo Verde government’s Tourism and Rural Environmental Improvement Programme, which aims to increase family incomes, enhance community resilience and ensure inclusive sustainable development. São Nicolau is one of the islands included in this programme, which will create 18 tourist villages nationally with an investment of approximately 8.2 million euros under the Tourism Operational Programme, where it is planned to introduce new infrastructure, improve existing infrastructure in terms of water supply and sanitation, and empower residents to better receive tourists.
